brief.name: objectcore
brief.intent: A self-replicating Claude Code plugin marketplace built as a software factory. A developer-tooling brand that should feel engineered, systematic, and credible — confident but not loud.

cases.question: Does this system read as modern, precise, trustworthy, technical?
cases.note: brand adjectives — refine and verify with a real judge

cases.question: Does this system read as garish, cluttered, or generic/off-brand?
